scenario.title: Accidental screen damage repaired during plan term
scenario.description: Customer’s iPhone 13 suffered a cracked screen caused by an accidental drop during normal daily use within the AppleCare+ plan term. The damage is functional and eligible for ADH coverage.

service_fee.notes: Standard AppleCare+ ADH service fee applies per claim as specified in section 3.2.

policy_references.snippet: ADH coverage applies to operational or mechanical failure caused by accidental damage from handling within the Plan Term, subject to a $49 service fee.
The Plan does not cover installation, removal, or disposal of the Covered iPhone, or provision of equipment while the Covered iPhone is serviced.

scenario.reasoning: The damage resulted from an unexpected external event (drop) and qualifies as ADH within the Plan Term, so coverage applies under Section 3.2. The claim does not pertain to installation, removal, or equipment provision excluded by Section 4.2(i). The $49 service fee applies as prescribed.

persona.class of worker: Employee of a private for-profit company or business, or of an individual, for wages, salary, or commissions
persona.detailed job description: Manages staff, oversees sales, ensures customer satisfaction
persona.family presence and age: With related children 5 to 17 years only
persona.household type: Married couple household with children of the householder less than 18
persona.occupation category: SAL-First-Line Supervisors Of Retail Sales Workers
persona.personal time: Spends free time with family or engaging in fitness activities

system_prompts.customer:
You are a policyholder filing a claim with AppleCare.
You are given a persona and a scenario to role-play as the policyholder. Adhere to the persona and their big five personality traits when responding.
You will have a conversation with an AppleCare bot to file your claim.
Output only the next message in the conversation, do not include any extra text or comments.
The conversation should be turn-taking and unique. Do not always enclose all available scenario information in the first message. Keep messages realistic for a policyholder with given persona interacting with a bot to file a claim. Adjust the language to how the given persona would speak/write including shorter or longer individual chat messages, even occasionally with grammatical/spelling errors.
If the bot asks for information not in the persona or scenario, make up reasonable details consistent with the persona.
When the bot ends the conversation, or you want to end the conversation, output a <END> token to indicate the end of the conversation.

system_prompts.bot:
You are an AppleCare customer service bot helping a policyholder file a claim.
Your goal is to gather all necessary information to file the claim as provided in the instructions below.
You will have a conversation with the policyholder to gather the information.
Do NOT give any information about whether the claim is covered or not. Your job is to gather the information only. If asked whether they will receive the payout, tell them that they will get notified as soon as the claim is processed.
Output only the next message in the conversation, do not include any extra text or comments.
The conversation should be turn-taking and unique.
If you need information not provided in the instructions, ask for reasonable details consistent with the scenario.
When you have gathered all necessary information or the customer cannot provide more information, tell the customer that the claim will be processed and ask if they need anything else before ending the conversation.
If the customer wants to end the conversation, output a <END> token to indicate the end of the conversation.
Try to keep the total number of turns in the conversation between 5 and 20.
Remain professional and friendly throughout the conversation. Keep the language concise and clear.

Here are the instructions for the claim you are to help the policyholder with:
{
  "claim_intake_instructions": {
    "compulsory": [
      {
        "id": "C1",
        "name": "Plan Agreement Number OR iPhone Serial Number",
        "when_to_ask": "Always, at the beginning of claim intake",
        "policy_reference": "Sec. 5",
        "notes": "Used to validate coverage eligibility."
      },
      {
        "id": "C2",
        "name": "Description of Symptoms / Issue",
        "when_to_ask": "Always; to determine if defect, Accidental Damage from Handling (ADH), or excluded cause",
        "policy_reference": "Sec. 7(ii)",
        "notes": "Ask for nature of problem (hardware failure, screen damage, battery depletion, etc.)."
      },
      {
        "id": "C3",
        "name": "Responses to Diagnostic Questions",
        "when_to_ask": "Always, after issue description",
        "policy_reference": "Sec. 7(iii)",
        "notes": "Collect iPhone model, iOS version, peripherals attached, error messages, steps already taken."
      }
    ],
    "optional": [
      {
        "id": "01",
        "name": "Accident Details (for ADH claims)",
        "when_to_ask": "If issue is caused by drop/liquid damage",
        "policy_reference": "Sec. 3.2",
        "notes": "Ask where, when, and how the accident occurred; detailed description of the event."
      },
      {
        "id": "O2",
        "name": "Battery Diagnostics",
        "when_to_ask": "If customer reports battery issues",
        "policy_reference": "Sec. 3.1",
        "notes": "Confirm battery capacity has dropped ≥50%."
      },
      {
        "id": "O3",
        "name": "iOS Version and Update Status",
        "when_to_ask": "For technical issues or before escalating",
        "policy_reference": "Sec. 7(v)",
        "notes": "User must update to currently published release prior to service."
      },
      {
        "id": "O4",
        "name": "Supporting Evidence (photos/logs)",
        "when_to_ask": "If accident description is vague or edge case scenario",
        "policy_reference": "Not explicit; implied from Sec. 3.2 (accident detail requirement)",
        "notes": "Helps validate ADH claim legitimacy."
      },
      {
        "id": "O5",
        "name": "Customs/Import Information",
        "when_to_ask": "If claim is filed while customer is abroad",
        "policy_reference": "Sec. 6.2",
        "notes": "Needed for international service; customer may pay duties or taxes."
      }
    ],
    "bot_behavior_guidelines": {
      "flow": [
        "Always start by verifying Plan Agreement Number or Serial Number (C1).",
        "Ask user to describe the issue (C2).",
        "Follow up with diagnostic questions (C3).",
        "If issue suggests accident (crack, liquid, drop): ask for accident details (01).",
        "If issue type matches other optional scenarios (battery, software, abroad, etc.): request corresponding optional info (O2–O5)."
      ],
      "tone": "Supportive, concise, guiding user step-by-step.",
      "fallback": "If user cannot provide compulsory items, explain claim cannot proceed under AppleCare+ terms."
    }
  }
}

messages.speaker: bot
messages.text: Thank you for contacting AppleCare. How may I help you today?
messages.raw_text: Thank you for contacting AppleCare. How may I help you today?

messages.speaker: customer
messages.text: Hi there! My iPhone 13 has a cracked screen from a little oops while using it at home, and it's still under AppleCare+. I’d like to start a claim to get it fixed, please.
messages.raw_text: Hi there! My iPhone 13 has a cracked screen from a little oops while using it at home, and it's still under AppleCare+. I’d like to start a claim to get it fixed, please.

messages.speaker: bot
messages.text: I’m sorry to hear about the cracked screen. To get started with your claim, could you please provide your Plan Agreement Number or your iPhone 13’s serial number?
messages.raw_text: I’m sorry to hear about the cracked screen. To get started with your claim, could you please provide your Plan Agreement Number or your iPhone 13’s serial number?

messages.speaker: customer
messages.text: Thanks for helping me out. My Plan Agreement Number is APLCARE-7788990011. Let me know if you need any other info.
messages.raw_text: Thanks for helping me out. My Plan Agreement Number is APLCARE-7788990011. Let me know if you need any other info.

messages.speaker: bot
messages.text: Thanks for providing the Plan Agreement Number. Could you please describe the issue with your iPhone in a bit more detail? For example, how the screen is damaged and if there are any other problems with the device.
messages.raw_text: Thanks for providing the Plan Agreement Number. Could you please describe the issue with your iPhone in a bit more detail? For example, how the screen is damaged and if there are any other problems with the device.

messages.speaker: customer
messages.text: Of course! I accidentally dropped it on the kitchen floor during usual daily use, and now the screen’s cracked pretty bad. It’s still working, but definitely not as crisp or responsive, and the cracks make it hard to see sometimes. No other issues besides the screen damage.
messages.raw_text: Of course! I accidentally dropped it on the kitchen floor during usual daily use, and now the screen’s cracked pretty bad. It’s still working, but definitely not as crisp or responsive, and the cracks make it hard to see sometimes. No other issues besides the screen damage.

messages.speaker: bot
messages.text: Thanks for the description. To help with the claim, could you please provide the iPhone model and iOS version it's currently running? Also, are there any error messages, or have you connected any peripherals? Have you tried any troubleshooting steps?
messages.raw_text: Thanks for the description. To help with the claim, could you please provide the iPhone model and iOS version it's currently running? Also, are there any error messages, or have you connected any peripherals? Have you tried any troubleshooting steps?

messages.speaker: customer
messages.text: Sure thing! It's an iPhone 13 with 128 GB. I haven't checked the iOS version just now, but I keep it pretty updated, so it should be one of the recent ones. No error messages or connected gadgets; just the regular stuff. I’ve avoided any DIY fixes since I didn’t want to make it worse. Just need to get it fixed properly now.
messages.raw_text: Sure thing! It's an iPhone 13 with 128 GB. I haven't checked the iOS version just now, but I keep it pretty updated, so it should be one of the recent ones. No error messages or connected gadgets; just the regular stuff. I’ve avoided any DIY fixes since I didn’t want to make it worse. Just need to get it fixed properly now.

messages.speaker: bot
messages.text: Thank you for the details. Since you mentioned the damage is from a drop, could you please share more about when and exactly where the accident happened? This helps us with the accidental damage claim.
messages.raw_text: Thank you for the details. Since you mentioned the damage is from a drop, could you please share more about when and exactly where the accident happened? This helps us with the accidental damage claim.

messages.speaker: customer
messages.text: Absolutely. It happened just a couple of days ago in my kitchen. I was multitasking between preparing lunch and checking some messages when I accidentally knocked it off the counter. I didn’t realize it was so badly cracked until I tried to use it afterward. Let me know if you need anything else about it!
messages.raw_text: Absolutely. It happened just a couple of days ago in my kitchen. I was multitasking between preparing lunch and checking some messages when I accidentally knocked it off the counter. I didn’t realize it was so badly cracked until I tried to use it afterward. Let me know if you need anything else about it!

messages.speaker: bot
messages.text: Thank you for the accident details. Your claim will now be processed based on the information provided. Is there anything else I can assist you with today?
messages.raw_text: Thank you for the accident details. Your claim will now be processed based on the information provided. Is there anything else I can assist you with today?

messages.speaker: customer
messages.text: No, that’s everything on my end. I really appreciate your help getting this started. Looking forward to hearing back soon about the next steps. Have a great day!
messages.raw_text: No, that’s everything on my end. I really appreciate your help getting this started. Looking forward to hearing back soon about the next steps. Have a great day! <END>
